body_txt: Bill is a jerk. He's abrasive, rude and obnoxious. What better way to highlight these qualities than through his sweet natured friend Mike, who is so much nicer than he is. Wait a minute, why are these two friends? Two friends, or at the very least friend-like companions who act as Foils to each other morally which is deliberately used to highlight those aspects of a character's morality. This only applies to very close friends where both friends are fully aware of the other's actions but are still friends anyway, which makes it interesting. The fact they they are close friends implies that one is not so different from the other, or they may share some moral aspects but not others. There will usually be some level of conflict in this situation, however. The better friend in this situation may be trying his hand at Contagious Heroism and Positive Friend Influence , while the worse one might be trying to have Toxic Friend Influence . The better one may be the worse ones Morality Pet or Morality Chain . Noble Male, Roguish Male and Light Feminine and Dark Feminine are examples of this with same-gendered friendships, although it might be the case that both characters could be noble/roguish/light/dark, just one more or less so than the other. This can relate to Bromantic Foil , only those are not necessarily moral foils, though they often are, and are limited to romance, this can also relate to Odd Friendship , only that the friends have more differences that don't relate to morals and manners and can have examples that don't even involve those two things at all. Freudian Trio is similar, although that has to include 3 people who are not necessarily friends. Characters in such relationships are known to start acting like each other after a while. See also Foil , Psycho Sidekick , Rude Hero, Nice Sidekick , Innocent Beta Bitch , Prankster's Partner , Token Evil Teammate , and Token Good Teammate .
